meta.publicDescription: تصفح دورات الأكاديمية العامة المسجلة على المنصة وسجل في الدورة المناسبة لك.
meta.publicDetailDescription: راجع تفاصيل الدورة ثم أكمل التسجيل بخطوات بسيطة.
meta.adminDescription: أنشئ وأدر دورات الأكاديمية العامة وراجع التسجيلات ومتابعة المدفوعات.
meta.adminDetailDescription: راجع إعدادات الدورة وتابع التسجيلات وحدّث محتوى الأكاديمية.

errors.generic: Something went wrong while processing your request.

hero.title: تعلٍم مع الأكاديمية
hero.subtitle: تصفح دورات الأكاديمية المفتوحة، راجع الموعد والسعر، وسجل في الدورة المناسبة بخطوات بسيطة.

empty.default: لم يتم نشر أي دورات في الأكاديمية بعد.

notFound.title: Course not found
notFound.note: This course may have been archived or the link is no longer available.

schedule.title: Lecture schedule
schedule.subtitle: Review the saved lecture timings before you register.

form.title: Register your seat
form.subtitle: Keep the form short and simple so registration stays fast.
form.noteBody: The platform resolves one final price for your account on the server. You do not need to choose a country here.

validation.required: Please enter your name and phone number first.

form.success: Your registration has been created successfully.

admin.title: إدارة دورات الأكاديمية العامة
admin.note: أنشئ الدورات، راقب التسجيلات، وتابع حركة الدفع من مكان واحد.

errors.generic: Something went wrong while saving academy changes.
errors.archivedReadOnly: This academy course is archived and read-only.
errors.missingPricing: A final price is required before publishing this academy course.
errors.unsupportedCurrency: The selected currency is not supported for this academy course.
errors.invalidPublishTransition: This academy course cannot be published from its current status.
errors.invalidArchiveTransition: This academy course cannot be archived from its current status.
errors.missingPlan: Set the course duration, lecture count, and timing before publishing.
errors.invalidPlanWindow: The course start time must be before the end time.
errors.invalidDuration: Enter a valid course duration in days.
errors.scheduleIncomplete: Set the course duration, lecture count, and timing before publishing.
errors.missingLecturePlan: Set the course duration, lecture count, and timing before adding lectures.
errors.invalidLectureWindow: Each lecture must stay within the course window.
errors.lectureLimitReached: This course already has the planned number of lectures.
errors.lectureOrderTaken: That lecture order is already in use.
errors.lectureOverlap: Lecture schedule overlaps with another lecture.

create.title: Create a new course
create.note: Start with a draft, then publish once the course content and scheduling are ready.
create.adminOnlyNote: يمكن للمسؤولين فقط إنشاء دورات الأكاديمية.
create.helper: حدّد المدة وعدد المحاضرات والمواعيد قبل حفظ الدورة.
create.failure: Unable to create the course right now.

validation.price: Enter a valid amount for EGP or USD.
validation.scheduleRequired: Duration, lecture count, and timing are required.
validation.invalidPlanWindow: End time must be after start time.
validation.invalidDuration: Enter a valid course duration in days.

placeholders.title: Course title
placeholders.shortDescription: A short summary for the public listing

create.endsAtPreviewHelper: The end time is calculated automatically from the start time and course duration.

error.heading: Unable to load courses

empty.heading: No courses found
empty.note: Try clearing filters or create the first course draft.

notFound.title: الدورة غير موجودة
notFound.note: قد تكون الدورة محذوفة أو لم يعد الرابط صالحًا.

update.note: يمكنك تعديل تفاصيل الدورة، وإضافة المحاضرات وتحديث الروابط العامة من هذه الصفحة.
update.failure: Unable to update the course right now.
update.helper: Changes are applied immediately after saving. Leave a market empty if you do not sell in that currency.

update.endsAtPreviewHelper: The end time is calculated automatically from the start time and course duration.

actions.failure: Unable to complete the action right now.

archiveConfirm.title: Archive course
archiveConfirm.description: This will hide the course from the public catalog.

lectures.heading: Course lectures
lectures.note: Add the actual lecture schedule before publishing. The course stays hidden until the lecture plan is complete.

create.note: Set the lecture order and timing. The course can only be published after the full lecture plan is saved.
create.endsAtHelper: The lecture end time is calculated automatically from the start time and selected duration.
